title: Maintain Typographic Integrity: Master CSS "font-synthesis" for Consistent UI
tweet: Ensure precise UI typography! Learn how CSS font-synthesis prevents unwanted browser-generated bold/italic styles, maintaining web font integrity. #CSSTypography #UIDesign #WebFonts #UserExperience
tip: The "font-synthesis" CSS property prevents browsers from artificially bolding or italicizing text when true bold or italic font faces are missing. This is crucial for preserving the intended design and visual hierarchy of your web fonts, enhancing overall UI consistency and user experience.
